title: Im moving to Austin?! — clean-slate identity declaration, soft-death framing
html:
Im moving to Austin?! — clean-slate identity declaration, soft-death framing

Source: 2025-10-03 Google Doc. The arrival manifesto. Written days after Yahir actually got to Austin. Framed explicitly as identity reset.

TL;DR

  • It's official: Yahir is in Austin Texas. Year-plus of planning collapses into actual move.
  • The Cam disappointment, owned: "My plan was to move there with my best friend Cam and do the Shaan Puri strat... but this isn't going to be the case, at least not initially. I am Disheartened by this deviation to the original plan, but this will not waver my commitment."
  • The mechanics dialed in: personal training job lined up (the NaviWell role), 1BR/1BA apartment via mom's help (the financial-cosigner pattern from the August doc), framed as "the launch pad with a great location."
  • The Minecraft metaphor: "ive been calling it getting the minecraft stone tools and getting food/wood part of the plan" — gamifying the bridge-income phase, signature Yahir framing.
  • Identity reset language: "This move is a clean slate. It feels like a soft death in many ways. What i am and what i have become in Oregon is all the past. This is the next chapter of my lore." — couples with chapter thinking motif and IRL Lore product framing.
  • The vision rendered: future wife, kids, parents at meals, brother across the poker table in a beautiful game room "at the crib." The legacy as domestic tableau motif again.
  • McGregor closer: "If you can see it, and you have the courage to speak it, then it will happen. Shout out OG McGregor" — same operating credo as 2026 01 29 letter to emily.

Pattern observed

This is the "soft death" doc — the cleanest articulation of Yahir's chapter by chapter life-architecture. Oregon = past. Austin = next chapter. The metaphor of "die and be reborn" is the same one underlying IRL Lore's "life as legend" pitch one month earlier.

The mom-as-cosigner solution that surfaced in the Aug planning doc actually executed — confirms the family-as-financial-bridge pattern. The Shaan Puri "strategically broke" frame still operative ~11 months after first appearing.

The Cam-departure regret is muted but present — "this will not waver my commitment" is the diplomatic version of the resentment that becomes explicit in the Sept 2025 NaviWell-arrival doc.

Key quotes

  • "It feels like a soft death in many ways. What i am and what i have become in Oregon is all the past. This is the next chapter of my lore."
  • "I will literally drown and tear everything if thats what it takes."
  • "I am ready to die and be reborn (metaphorically)."

Open questions

  • The "minecraft stone tools" framing — does Yahir use the Minecraft tech-tree metaphor elsewhere? (Worth scanning future thoughts-and-things docs.)
  • The poker-room-with-brother vision — references Dominic? Or a younger sibling not yet entitied?
